des: Keibert Ruiz singles on a ground ball to right fielder Matt Shaw.
Nasim Nuñez grounds out, shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Joey Wiemer scores.

Nationals challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: CJ Abrams singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Matt Shaw. Brady House scores. Daylen Lile scores. CJ Abrams out at 2nd on the throw, right fielder Matt Shaw to second baseman Nico Hoerner to shortstop Dansby Swanson. Joey Wiemer to 3rd.
Joey Wiemer walks. Daylen Lile to 2nd.
Daylen Lile singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Matt Shaw. Andrés Chaparro scores. Brady House to 3rd.
Brady House singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Andrés Chaparro to 3rd.
Andrés Chaparro doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Matt Shaw.
Nasim Nuñez called out on strikes.
Joey Wiemer homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Daylen Lile lines out to right fielder Matt Shaw.
Andrés Chaparro flies out sharply to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong.
